name: Chocolate and Cherry Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together flour, sugar, baking soda, cinnamon and salt.
2. In another bowl, combine eggs, oil and vanilla; add to flour mixture, and mix well. Stir in cherry pie filling, chocolate chips and nuts.
3. Turn mixture into a greased and floured 10-inch fluted tube pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
5. Cool in pan on a wire rack. Remove from pan, and sift powdered sugar on top.
